name: sim_gtower_quad_gl3_o3_so3_u3
key_claim: GL→O→SO→U composition is order-preserving; four-way intersection = SO(3)

CAN: verify GL, O, SO, U shells simultaneously active (pytorch float64/complex128)
confirm GL→O→SO→U composition equals direct projection (order-preserving)
identify SO(3) as four-way intersection of all shells
z3 UNSAT: det=0 ∧ M^TM=I impossible; det=-1 ∧ det=+1 impossible
verify gl(3)⊃o(3)⊃so(3)⊂u(3) algebra nesting via sympy trace/antisymmetry
confirm Spin(3) rotor in SO(3) and U(3) simultaneously via Cl(3,0)
sample SO(3) via geomstats, pass all four group tests simultaneously
encode GL→O→SO→U path (length=3) in rustworkx DAG
register 4-node hyperedge with all pairwise and triple sub-faces in xgi
verify SO(3) samples embedded as complex unitary form single component via gudhi H0=1
CANNOT: find a GL(3,R) element in U(3) that is not also in SO(3) (GL\O is excluded)
find an O(3) element with det=-1 in SO(3) or U(3) (sharp det boundary)

pytorch.reason: load-bearing: dtype=torch.float64 for real group elements; constructs GL∋A, O∋B, SO∋C simultaneously; complexification to U(3) via torch.complex128; quad non-commutativity A∘B∘C∘D ≠ D∘C∘B∘A; four-way intersection = SO(3) verified.

pyg.reason: not used in this quad coexistence probe; beyond-quad coupling deferred.

z3.reason: load-bearing: UNSAT #1: det=0 AND M^TM=I impossible (GL exclusion boundary); UNSAT #2: det=-1 AND det=+1 impossible (O\SO separation).

cvc5.reason: not used in this quad coexistence probe; beyond-quad coupling deferred.

sympy.reason: load-bearing: gl(3) ⊃ o(3) ⊃ so(3) ⊂ u(3) algebra nesting; real antisymmetric generators satisfy both so(3) and anti-Hermitian u(3) conditions; trace/antisymmetry conditions verified symbolically.

clifford.reason: load-bearing: Cl(3,0) even subalgebra Spin(3) ≅ SU(2); rotor R ∈ Spin(3) is simultaneously in SO(3) (det=+1, real orthogonal) and U(3) (complex unitary when cast to complex128); shows GL→U span at Clifford level.

geomstats.reason: load-bearing: SpecialOrthogonal(n=3) random sample passes all four group membership tests (GL: det≠0; O: M^TM=I; SO: det=+1; U: M†M=I as complex cast) simultaneously.

e3nn.reason: not used in this quad coexistence probe; beyond-quad coupling deferred.

rustworkx.reason: load-bearing: G-tower DAG GL→O→SO→U; path length=3 from GL to U confirmed; U(3) is the first node with complex-group character (out-edges into SU, Sp); SO has in-deg=1 (from O) and out-deg=1 (to U).

xgi.reason: load-bearing: 4-node hyperedge {GL,O,SO,U}; all 4 pairwise sub-faces and 4 triple sub-faces verified present.

toponetx.reason: not used in this quad coexistence probe; beyond-quad coupling deferred.

gudhi.reason: load-bearing: Rips filtration on 50 SO(3) samples embedded as complex unitary matrices in R^18 (flatten real+imag); H0=1 confirms connected single component.

o3_shell_active.detail: O(3) shell: B^T B = I (O(3) membership confirmed; det=-1 reflects O\SO)

so3_shell_active.detail: SO(3) shell: C^T C = I and det=+1 (SO(3) membership confirmed)

u3_shell_active.detail: U(3) shell: D†D=I (U(3) membership confirmed via SO(3) complexification)

gl_o_so_u_chain_order_preserving.detail: GL→O→SO→U composition equals direct GL→SO projection; chain is order-preserving

fourfold_intersection_is_so3.detail: SO(3) element passes all four tests: four-way intersection ⊇ SO(3)

o3_minus_so3_not_in_so.detail: O(3)\SO(3) witness B (det=-1): in GL, in O, but not in SO

gl3_minus_o3_witness.detail: GL(3,R)\O(3) witness A (upper triangular): in GL but not O

z3_unsat_det0_and_orthogonal.detail: z3 UNSAT: det=0 (zero column) AND M^TM=I (unit norm) impossible; GL exclusion boundary

z3_unsat_det_neg1_and_pos1.detail: z3 UNSAT: det=-1 AND det=+1 impossible; O(3)\SO(3) is a sharp boundary

z3_unsat_unit_norm_and_degenerate.detail: z3 UNSAT: column norm=1 AND column norm≤0 impossible; O(3) membership excludes singular matrices

sympy_so3_generator_antisymmetric.detail: so(3) generator is real antisymmetric: M + M^T = 0 (so(3) algebra condition)

sympy_so3_generator_traceless.detail: so(3) generators are traceless: real antisymmetric 3×3 always has Tr=0

sympy_so3_in_u3_algebra.detail: so(3) generators (real antisymmetric) satisfy u(3) anti-Hermitian condition: so(3) ⊂ u(3)

sympy_so3_generator_in_gl3_algebra.detail: so(3) generator is a nonzero gl(3) element: gl(3) ⊃ so(3) at algebra level

sympy_algebra_nesting_gl_o_so_u.detail: gl(3) ⊃ o(3) (add det≠0) ⊃ so(3) (add det=+1) ⊂ u(3) (add complexification): nesting verified

clifford_spin3_unit_rotor.detail: Cl(3,0) rotor R = cos(t) + sin(t)*e12: R~R = 1 (Spin(3) member)

clifford_spin3_in_so3_and_u3.detail: Cl(3,0) Spin(3) rotor → SO(3) rotation matrix; cast to complex ∈ U(3): GL→U span at Clifford level

clifford_e12_is_complex_structure.detail: e12^2 = -1 in Cl(3,0): e12 is the complex structure J; enables SO(3)→U(3) complexification

geomstats_so3_sample_all_four_tests.detail: geomstats SO(3) random sample passes GL, O, SO, U tests simultaneously

rustworkx_u3_complex_entry.detail: U(3): in-deg=1 (from SO), out-deg=1 (to SU); first complex node in chain

rustworkx_so3_middle_node.detail: SO(3) is a middle node in the GL→O→SO→U chain (in-deg=1, out-deg=1)

xgi_quad_triple_subfaces.detail: xgi: all 4 triple sub-faces of the quad hyperedge are present

xgi_quad_pairwise_subfaces.detail: xgi: at least 4 pairwise sub-faces present

gudhi_so3_complex_embed_connected.detail: gudhi: 50 SO(3) samples embedded as complex unitary in R^18; H0=1 (single connected component)

singular_excluded_from_gl.detail: Singular matrix (det=0) is NOT in GL(3,R) — exclusion boundary confirmed

o3_reflection_excluded_from_so3.detail: Reflection diag(-1,1,1) ∈ O(3) but NOT SO(3): det=-1 excluded by SO

scaling_excluded_from_o_so_u.detail: 2*I ∈ GL(3,R) but NOT O(3), SO(3), or U(3): GL is the largest shell

rank1_excluded_from_all_shells_except_tr.detail: Rank-1 projection: not in GL (det=0) and not in O (M^TM ≠ I)

identity_in_all_four_shells.detail: I_3 ∈ GL ∩ O ∩ SO ∩ U: common boundary element of all four shells

near_singular_barely_in_gl.detail: diag(eps,1,1) with eps=1e-5: barely ∈ GL but not O or SO — sharp GL boundary

identity_invariant_under_chain.detail: GL→O→SO→U chain preserves identity at every step (boundary invariance)

so3_element_on_complexification_boundary.detail: SO(3) rotation: on boundary; passes both SO(3) real test and U(3) complex test
